quality_grading_layer.classifier_responsibility: EfficientNetB0 predicts produce type and healthy/rotten condition only.
quality_grading_layer.grading_responsibility: Rule layer combines model evidence with interpretable image proxy features.

inference_safeguards.note: Runtime API cannot know whether a prediction is wrong. High-confidence error analysis is only used in evaluation where ground truth exists.

selection_reason: Selected as the final deployment candidate after grouped source-image split retraining and XAI risk review. EfficientNetB0 fine-tuned has marginally higher accuracy/weighted F1 than ResNet50 fine-tuned and fewer high-confidence errors in the grouped XAI audit. ResNet50 remains an important comparison model because it has stronger macro F1 and weak rotten-class F1.

selection_caveats.model_selection_tradeoff: EfficientNetB0 is selected for deployment-risk posture: slightly higher accuracy/weighted F1 and fewer high-confidence errors. ResNet50 has higher macro F1 and stronger weak rotten-class F1, so this tradeoff must be explained explicitly.
selection_caveats.xai_risk: Grad-CAM found high-confidence errors in both top models; Grad-CAM is decision-support evidence, not segmentation-quality localization.
selection_caveats.deployment_position: The model should support producer/admin review, not autonomous quality approval.
selection_caveats.external_validation: Current custom-image set is small and banana-heavy; broaden it before making robustness claims.
